title: draba alpina var. glacialis
intro: Draba alpina var. glacialis, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass, is a rare, alpine plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Draba alpina var. glacialis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
